mapper.insert: insert into member(name, login_id, email, nickname, member_type, phone, gender, birth, profile_img_url, signup_type, member_status, email_verified, email_verified_at) values(#{name},#{login_id},#{email}, #{nickname},#{member_type},#{phone},#{gender},#{birth},#{profile_img_url},'LOCAL', 'ACTIVE', #{email_verified},#{email_verified_at})
insert into member_local_auth(username, password_hash, password_updated_at, failed_login_count, member_id) values(#{username}, #{password_hash}, sysdate(), 0, #{member_id})
mapper.select: select count(*) from member where nickname=#{nickname}
select count(*) from member where login_id=#{loginId}

select email_verification_id, email, purpose, code_hash, expires_at, verified_at, attempt_count, resend_count, created_at, member_id from email_verification where email = #{email} and purpose = #{purpose} order by email_verification_id desc limit 1

select email_verification_id, email, purpose, code_hash, expires_at, verified_at, attempt_count, resend_count, created_at, member_id from email_verification where email = #{email} and purpose = #{purpose} order by email_verification_id desc limit 1 for update
select count(*) from email_verification where created_at >= date_sub(now(), interval 1 day)
mapper.insert: insert into email_verification( email, purpose, code_hash, expires_at, attempt_count, resend_count, member_id ) values( #{email}, #{purpose}, #{code_hash}, #{expires_at}, 0, 0, null )
mapper.update: update email_verification set verified_at = now() where email_verification_id = #{emailVerificationId} and verified_at is null
